name: aios-workspace
description: Agent-native operating system for an individual contributor: governed workspace scaffold, multi-agent harnesses with rubric-gated self-correction, AIOS Team Brain sync client, and a local GUI.

scripts.lint: eslint scripts validation gui/server gui/client/src test
scripts.lint:fix: eslint scripts validation gui/server gui/client/src test --fix
scripts.test: npm run build:loop && node test/agent-readiness-glob.test.mjs && node test/skill-scan.test.mjs && node test/skill-install.test.mjs && node test/suggest-connectors.test.mjs && node test/brain-config.test.mjs && node test/slack-personal-descriptor.test.mjs && node test/connector-oauth.test.mjs && node test/skill-install-marketplace.test.mjs && node scripts/brain-mcp.test.mjs && node test/ux/judge.test.mjs && node test/ux/driver.test.mjs && node test/ux/tool-policy.test.mjs && node test/ux/proc.test.mjs && node test/ux/json-extract.test.mjs && node test/ux/run-ux-skip.test.mjs && node --test gui/server/session-index.test.mjs gui/server/sessions-search.test.mjs gui/server/approval-mode-governance.test.mjs && npm run test --workspace gui/client && node test/relay-core-env.test.mjs && node test/build.test.mjs && node test/review-bugbot.test.mjs && node test/build-loop.test.mjs && node test/build-fence.test.mjs && node test/build-log-append.test.mjs && node test/git-ceiling.test.mjs && node test/loop-models.test.mjs && node --test test/spec-eval-deterministic.test.mjs test/spec-eval-rubric.test.mjs test/spec-eval-adversarial.test.mjs test/spec-eval-fix-loop.test.mjs test/spec-eval-cli.test.mjs test/spec-eval-live.test.mjs && node test/fix-ladder.test.mjs && node test/review-timeout-retry.test.mjs && node test/build-findings.test.mjs && node test/consolidate-findings.test.mjs && node test/consolidate-findings.cli.test.mjs && node test/pr.test.mjs && node test/wait-for-bots-exit.test.mjs && node test/tasks-table.test.mjs && node test/costs.test.mjs && node test/slack-cli-sync.test.mjs && node test/sync-plan.test.mjs && node test/analyze.test.mjs && node --test test/rails-suggest.test.mjs test/rails-apply.test.mjs test/rails-missing.test.mjs && node --test test/operator-loop/*.test.mjs
scripts.app:dev: npm run gui:build && dotenvx run -- tauri dev
